title: pfr operation
description: Isothermal plug-flow reactor. The volume is integrated by RK4; nSteps controls the spatial discretisation.

V_R.title: Reactor volume
V_R.description: Total reactor volume; RK4 integrates over the residence-time interval [0, V_R / Q_feed].

nSteps.title: RK4 steps
nSteps.description: Number of RK4 integration steps along the reactor length.

writeInterval.title: Profile log interval
writeInterval.description: Interval for printing the (V, T, conversion) profile; 0 prints only the end point.
